授業目的: The purpose of this course is for students to learn business fundamentals using English through situational practice, evaluation of information, and creation of new ideas.
到達目標: Students will be able to … • Remember and understand main ideas and details from readings and video content through summaries, discussions, and connections • Synthesize information and concepts to create new ideas through charts, diagrams, videos, and inventions • Analyze and evaluate information and data providing comparisons, explanations, inferences, critiques, and recommendations using discourse markers and business vocabulary • Communicate through the understanding and use of gestures, eye contact and tone of voice while applying business concepts and vocabulary
授業の概要・背景:
• Learn about the fundamentals of “entrepreneurship”
• Discuss case studies and apply critical thinking skills
• Create, name, and develop a new product or service
• Create a marketing survey, collect data, analyze, and present results
• Multimedia presentation(s) using business English
• Create a professional business (marketing) plan
• Create a professional, interesting video describing product or service benefits
• Produce a professional western style business resume
• Participate in a job interview and effectively answer and ask questions
授業方法: This course will use a variety of learning activities ranging from lectures, discussions, presentations, pair work, and group work.

学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic: 各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。DP・ CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する以下の能力が養成されます。言語教育科目：１．言語 コミュニケーション能力：外国語力を生かし、積極的に発信できる。２．異文化理解・多文化共生力：異文化に対する感受性をもち、多様な文化と共生できる。
成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.
